case_title: LONNIE LANDERS VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-25-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
